CustomField.description: The date is automatically set based on the period and contract start date. For eg, if the contract starts on September 20, 2024, with an annual period, the escalation date will be September 1, 2025. By default, it is set to the 1st of the month, but users can enter the exact escalation date. For regenerating or editing schedules, users can update the date, and schedules will adjust accordingly.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The date is automatically set based on the period and contract start date. For eg, if the contract starts on September 20, 2024, with an annual period, the escalation date will be September 1, 2025. By default, it is set to the 1st of the month, but users can enter the exact escalation date. For regenerating or editing schedules, users can update the date, and schedules will adjust accordingly.
CustomField.label: First Escalation Date
